targets.rawSQL:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN r.purpose = 'construction' THEN f.are_price END AS construction,
  CASE WHEN r.purpose = 'sown' THEN f.are_price END AS sown
FROM plots_price_fact f
JOIN plots_dim r ON r.slug = f.slug
WHERE f.is_current = true
  AND r.purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote})
  AND (
    TRY_CAST('$district' AS INTEGER) IS NULL
    OR r.micro_district = CAST('$district' AS INTEGER)
  );

WITH change_product AS (
    SELECT
        r.slug,
        EXP(
            SUM(
                LN(NULLIF(1 + f.are_price_change, 0))
            )
        ) AS fact_price_change_product
    FROM plots_dim r
    JOIN plots_price_fact f
        ON r.slug = f.slug
    WHERE f.are_price_change IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY r.slug
),
current AS (
    SELECT
        r.micro_district,
        r.purpose,
        r.slug AS slug,
        r.land_square,
        r.square_original,
        r.square_corrected_by_llm,
        r.price_original,
        r.price_corrected_by_llm,
        r.llm_confidence,
        f.are_price * r.land_square AS price,
        -- map integer array -> string array
        TRANSFORM(
            r.document,
            d -> CASE d
                WHEN 1 THEN 'Договор купли-продажи'
                WHEN 2 THEN 'Договор дарения'
                WHEN 3 THEN 'Договор долевого участия'
                WHEN 4 THEN 'Технический паспорт'
                WHEN 5 THEN 'Акт ввода в эксплуатацию'
                WHEN 6 THEN 'Красная книга'
                WHEN 7 THEN 'Зелёная книга'
                WHEN 8 THEN 'Свидетельство о праве на наследство'
                ELSE CAST(d AS VARCHAR)
            END
        ) AS document,
        ROUND(f.are_price) AS fact_are_price
    FROM plots_price_fact f
    JOIN plots_dim r
        ON f.slug = r.slug
    WHERE f.is_current = true
        AND (
            TRY_CAST('$district' AS INTEGER) IS NULL
            OR r.micro_district = CAST('$district' AS INTEGER)
        ) AND r.purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote})
)
SELECT
    c.micro_district,
    c.purpose,
    c.slug,
    c.document,
    c.land_square,
    c.fact_are_price,
    c.price,
    ROUND(cp.fact_price_change_product, 4) AS fact_price_change_product,
    c.square_original,
    c.price_original,
    c.square_corrected_by_llm,
    c.price_corrected_by_llm,
    c.llm_confidence
FROM current c
LEFT JOIN change_product cp
    ON c.slug = cp.slug
ORDER BY fact_price_change_product DESC;
select effective_from, purpose, total_price FROM plots_market_summary WHERE slug = '$district' AND purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote}) ORDER BY effective_from;

select effective_from, purpose, total_price_change, total_land_square_change, object_count_change FROM plots_market_summary WHERE slug = '$district' AND purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote}) ORDER BY effective_from;
select effective_from, purpose, total_land_square FROM plots_market_summary WHERE slug = '$district' AND purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote}) ORDER BY effective_from;
select effective_from, purpose, total_price/total_land_square as are_price FROM plots_market_summary WHERE slug = '$district' AND purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote}) ORDER BY effective_from;
select effective_from, purpose, object_count FROM plots_market_summary WHERE slug = '$district' AND purpose IN (${purpose:singlequote}) ORDER BY effective_from;
